enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on January 12, 2017, covering a plumber visit to fix his shower, financial stress from borrowing money from his mom, and his plan to sell his van to get out of debt. He also mentions working on a bike race level page project and watching the TV show Versailles on Netflix.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: committed to selling it this time with better photos, maintenance records, and creative YouTube commercials
acknowledges it is causing tension and recognizes he needs to stop and become self-sufficient
feels he left it in a state of abandonment and wants to dedicate focused time to finish it
thinks it is really good — realistic, seriously done, and exactly the kind of show he enjoys

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't do yesterday's video because it was a different day and I got through it easily.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I may have reversed my sleep schedule because I just woke up at 6:30 in the morning, which is usually when I go to sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I stayed up all night and didn't get to sleep until around 1.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working at the Plimer until 1, and my mom came over and was hanging out at the beginning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finally had my mom call a Plimer and put a whole new fixture in there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The new fixture is a lot easier to adjust, gets hot, and doesn't leak.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The new fixture cost about $500.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My shower stopped working because the hot water just stopped doing anything when you turn it on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't have a shower last night and waited until the fixture was fixed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom is getting super pissed off because I keep getting her to give me money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've had my mom give me $7,000 over the last couple of months.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom sold her house in Virginia to her brother for cash and got money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been siphoning money off from my mom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I really need to start selling my car on Monday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom says to start high with the car price, so I think I'll start at $25,000.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll sell the car for real this time, unlike last time when I didn't include all the photos and maintenance information.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll take more photos, update the maintenance records, and make a YouTube video for the car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I'll do a YouTube video every week, like different commercial genres, to entice people to buy my van.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I could do mock trips and artistic angles to make the van seem cool.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I was working on the bike race level page and realized I left a lot of it in a state of abandonment.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't finish getting my pictures for the bike race level page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to put my stuff back in and finish the bike race level page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I get my green screen in the mail, it'll be a little project to figure out how to work it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I told my mom I wouldn't start selling the car full-time until Thursday, Friday, Saturday, or Sunday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to work on the bike race level page full-time because there's so much to do with it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to get my surface-level stuff on the website fixed to help sell my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I took $2,000 out of my line of credit because I forgot I'd have to pay anything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tried to sell my car last summer, but right after I put it on sale, I had light problems that took a couple of weeks to fix.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My rocket box fell off, but I fixed it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was listening to 'Versaiman,' which is a really good, realistic, and seriously done TV show.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There are so many historical shows on Netflix that I like.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I've talked for long enough and will peace out now.

She sold her house, mom's house in Virginia to her brother for cash and got money.
